3222220.name: Tree of Dreams
3222220.description:
He is an adventurer obsessed with treasure. You rush into the heart of dangerous lands, where every step can be your last. In this world, countless enemies, deadly traps, mysterious dungeons and, of course, treasures await you. You are not afraid of any dangers, neither countless enemies, nor deadly traps. You are ready to challenge fate, put your life on the line to find what makes your heart beat faster - treasures.

You have to:

- Fight countless enemies, each of which poses a threat to your life. You will use weapons, magic, tricks to stay alive.
- Die and be reborn again and again, each time becoming stronger. You will learn from your mistakes, gain new experience, collect treasures to become stronger in the next run.
- Collect treasures that will help you survive and win. You will look for gold, diamonds, magic items, weapons, armor.
